testcase.name: test_discover_returns_users

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'page': 1, 'total': 19, 'users': [{'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'CosmicTester', 'id': 'e01553e1-4309-4c57-b771-adf04c359ca8', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'RitualTester', 'id': '77ef8e4e-604a-49ba-b38e-73aea372eaf7', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Happy ', 'id': 'c03bcc3a-0d91-4307-a164-73eedd1ae6bf', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Test User', 'id': '90fae86f-a177-425a-8144-75a4131d6389', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Zen Test User', 'id': '6666d85e-1b25-4a38-9b77-b44ac65b0de4', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Mood Test User', 'id': 'bf70c29d-be22-429e-bd26-2ad53aaccfb1', 'is_friend': False, ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cardology_mayan.py:373: in test_discover_returns_users assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'page': 1, 'total': 19, 'users': [{'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'CosmicTester', 'id': 'e01553e1-4309-4c57-b771-adf04c359ca8', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'RitualTester', 'id': '77ef8e4e-604a-49ba-b38e-73aea372eaf7', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Happy ', 'id': 'c03bcc3a-0d91-4307-a164-73eedd1ae6bf', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Test User', 'id': '90fae86f-a177-425a-8144-75a4131d6389', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Zen Test User', 'id': '6666d85e-1b25-4a38-9b77-b44ac65b0de4', 'is_friend': False, ...}, {'avatar_style': 'purple-teal', 'display_name': 'Mood Test User', 'id': 'bf70c29d-be22-429e-bd26-2ad53aaccfb1', 'is_friend': False, ...}, ...]}, list)
